title: rubus alceifolius var. diversilobatus
intro: Rubus alceifolius var. diversilobatus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Wineberry, is a variety of the Himalayan Raspberry plant, a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus alceifolius var. diversilobatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging benefits. The plant is used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
